815.title: Mary Berry Cooks : A Dinner Party
815.description: Mary shows how to cook dishes to impress guests at a dinner party without getting hot and bothered in the kitchen, including two delicious canapés, a salmon and asparagus starter, a main course of guinea fowl and a decadent chocolate tart.

816.title: Call the Midwife
816.description: Lucille helps elderly hoarder Clarice Millgrove who is struggling to keep her independence, and Sister Hilda and the team work hard to help a Ghanaian family with an undiagnosed illness. Also, Violet puts herself forward in the upcoming elections.

817.title: The Last Post : The Bigger Picture
817.description: Joe's future in the army hangs in the balance. Armstrong fears for Yusra's safety. Honor is devastated by Joe's secret past. Markham struggles between duty and his own moral compass.

818.title: Father Brown : The Darkest Noon
818.description: When Father Brown and Mallory go missing, it's up to the gang to save them from a man hell-bent on revenge.

819.title: Call the Midwife
819.description: Lucille helps elderly hoarder Clarice Millgrove who is struggling to keep her independence, and Sister Hilda and the team work hard to help a Ghanaian family with an undiagnosed illness. Also, Violet puts herself forward in the upcoming elections.

820.title: The Last Post : The Bigger Picture
820.description: Joe's future in the army hangs in the balance. Armstrong fears for Yusra's safety. Honor is devastated by Joe's secret past. Markham struggles between duty and his own moral compass.

821.title: Father Brown : The Cat of Mastigatus

822.title: Bargain Hunt : Hemswell 25
822.description: Anita Manning presents from the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire and is joined by experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. A team of best friends takes on a young married couple to buy three items which they hope will make them a profit at auction.

824.title: Keeping Up Appearances : Looking at Properties
824.description: Hyacinth decides to have a second attempt at finding a weekend home in the country and Elizabeth is called in to help her on her property search. Her final choice is `interesting' to say the least and worries Richard enormously.

825.title: Doctors : The Truth, the Whole Truth...

826.title: EastEnders
826.description: Mo's big revelation leaves Jean shocked, Phil is touched to be invited to a special event for Bert and Ernie, and Iqra's good deed backfires leaving her guilt-ridden.

827.title: Father Brown : The Cat of Mastigatus

828.title: Bargain Hunt : Hemswell 25
828.description: Anita Manning presents from the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire and is joined by experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. A team of best friends takes on a young married couple to buy three items which they hope will make them a profit at auction.

829.title: Impossible
829.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

830.title: Antiques Roadshow : Aerospace Bristol 2
830.description: Discoveries include a four-leaf clover brooch which brings luck to its owner, as well as a collection of Radiohead memorabilia. A former Concorde pilot reminisces about the celebrity passengers he used to fly across the Atlantic.

832.title: Keeping Up Appearances : Looking at Properties
832.description: Hyacinth decides to have a second attempt at finding a weekend home in the country and Elizabeth is called in to help her on her property search. Her final choice is `interesting' to say the least and worries Richard enormously.

833.title: Bargain Hunt : Newark 23
833.description: Presenter Natasha Raskin is in the driving hot seat, joined by experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. A married couple take on best friends, each buying three items which will hopefully make them a profit at auction. Natasha also heads into Nottingham to learn about the life of William Booth, the man who created The Salvation Army.

834.title: Doctors : The Truth, the Whole Truth...

835.description: Mo's big revelation leaves Jean shocked, Phil is touched to be invited to a special event for Bert and Ernie, and Iqra's good deed backfires leaving her guilt-ridden.

837.title: Father Brown : The Flower of the Fairway

838.title: Antiques Roadshow : Aerospace Bristol 2
838.description: Discoveries include a four-leaf clover brooch which brings luck to its owner, as well as a collection of Radiohead memorabilia. A former Concorde pilot reminisces about the celebrity passengers he used to fly across the Atlantic.

839.title: Bad Move : Dead Zone
839.description: Nicky and Steve's move to their dream house in the country is rapidly turning into a nightmare because they cannot get connected to the internet.

840.title: Keeping Up Appearances : Please Mind Your Head
840.description: When Hyacinth and the long-suffering Richard spend their first day in their new weekend residence, it proves to be less than adequate in size. Hyacinth invites Elizabeth and Emmet round for country tea, but both this and her plans to fit in with the local way of life go terribly wrong.

841.title: Doctors : The Truth, the Whole Truth...

842.description: Mo's big revelation leaves Jean shocked, Phil is touched to be invited to a special event for Bert and Ernie, and Iqra's good deed backfires leaving her guilt-ridden.

843.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

844.title: Mary Berry Cooks : A Dinner Party
844.description: Mary shows how to cook dishes to impress guests at a dinner party without getting hot and bothered in the kitchen, including two delicious canapés, a salmon and asparagus starter, a main course of guinea fowl and a decadent chocolate tart.

845.title: Friday Night Dinner : Wilson
845.description: The boys are threatened with no crumble if they don't help to assemble a wooden shelf, while Jim's dog Wilson keeps doing his 'dollops' in Mum and Dad's flowerbed.

846.title: Doctors : Push
846.description: Ruhma supports one couple from the start to the end of their pregnancy journey, but must admit that she needs help herself.

847.title: EastEnders
847.description: Callum's work leaves Ben feeling uneasy, and Kat finds herself in a frightening situation.

848.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : In My Memory Lock'd
848.description: Frank and Lu have a mystery to solve when a man with no recollection of who he is or where he came from wanders into their lives.

849.title: Silent Witness : Life Licence
849.description: When an ex-convict is killed in his home, the team meet a psychologist who works with murderers.

850.title: Father Brown : The Sacrifice of Tantalus
